author: Brandon Bachmeier
name: Flicker Test
description: Diagnostic 4-cell bisect grid (phase 3 — killer combo). T1: pure CSS spin (control). T2: background-image URL swap @ 1.5s on a div with filter:blur(40px)+brightness+saturate AND transform:scale(1.2) — exactly mimics production .art-bg. T3: backdrop-filter over moving content. T4: plain URL swap @ 1.5s (no filter, control). T2 vs T4 isolates whether it's the URL swap or the filter-on-bg-image combo that flickers.
